description_for_human: Search MT Newswires for real-time financial news, market commentary, and breaking alerts.
description_for_model: Provides access to MT Newswires' real-time financial news and market intelligence via data feed integration. MT Newswires delivers news via API (JSON/XML), FTP, or RSS feeds covering equities, FX, fixed income, commodities, and macroeconomics. The MCP server wraps the news feed into callable tools for searching articles, retrieving market commentary, and accessing breaking alerts.

functions.name: search_news
functions.description: Search MT Newswires for real-time financial news articles by keyword, ticker symbol, category, or date range.

query.description: Search query for news articles (e.g., company name, topic, or keyword)

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol to filter news (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

start_date.description: Start date filter in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01)

end_date.description: End date filter in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-12-31)

limit.description: Maximum number of articles to return

functions.name: get_market_commentary
functions.description: Retrieve MT Newswires market commentary and analysis on a specific market topic, asset class, or region.

topic.description: Market topic or theme (e.g., 'fed rate decision', 'tech earnings', 'oil prices')

functions.name: get_breaking_alerts
functions.description: Retrieve the latest breaking news alerts from MT Newswires, filtered by category or ticker.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol to filter alerts (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

limit.description: Maximum number of alerts to return
